briefs._status_line: Built 5-shot reel blueprint · aligned to Copy beats · reused 4 assets · cover frame locked

visual_direction.reference_energy: Apple Watch Studio launch films — clean, clinical, confident
visual_direction.color_bias: #C9A84C accent on specs only, otherwise monochrome + FKM rubber
visual_direction.motion_style: Slow push-ins on proof shots, whip transitions, no handheld shake

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) mounted on Royal Pop case, side view
shot_list.action: Static, shallow depth of field, wrist implied at edge
shot_list.framing: Rule of thirds, product centred, wrist barely visible
shot_list.must_capture: IMG-01 (HERO still), 40.35mm socket fit, 0.7mm retaining lip, FKM rubber texture, strap integration

shot_list.subject: Exploded view: Cradle Adapter V1 separated from Royal Pop case, specs annotated
shot_list.framing: Adapter and case separated by 2cm, rotated 15° each
shot_list.must_capture: IMG-02 (TECHNICAL_BOARD), 40.35mm socket diameter, 0.7mm retaining lip, 22mm lug width

shot_list.subject: Extreme close-up: FKM rubber texture and 0.7mm retaining lip against case edge
shot_list.framing: Raking light from left, case edge blurred
shot_list.must_capture: IMG-03 (DETAIL_MACRO), FKM rubber grain, 0.7mm lip, case contact point

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Arctic Blue) on wrist with Royal Pop, strap integration
Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on wrist, slow push-in to adapter
shot_list.framing: Wrist centred, adapter fills frame by end
shot_list.must_capture: Reuse IMG-01 composition, FKM texture, strap loop

edit_plan.edit_instruction: Open on Shot 1 (IMG-01). Hold 2s. Overlay text: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. FKM. No drilling.' (top 20%)
Cut to Shot 2 (IMG-02). Hold 2s. Overlay text: 'Engineered for the Royal Pop’s exact case.' (bottom 20%)
edit_plan.on_screen_text: Engineered for the Royal Pop’s exact case.

edit_plan.edit_instruction: Cut to Shot 3 (IMG-03). Hold 1.5s. Overlay text: '0.7mm retaining lip locks it secure.' (bottom 20%)
Cut to Shot 4 (IMG-04). Hold 1.5s. Overlay text: 'FKM rubber. No scratches. No glue.' (top 20%)
edit_plan.on_screen_text: FKM rubber. No scratches. No glue.

edit_plan.edit_instruction: Cut to Shot 5. Slow push-in (1s). Overlay text: 'Pre-Order Now.' (bottom 20%, #C9A84C). Hold 1s.

asset_requirements.notes: Reuse IMG-01 composition, add slow zoom to adapter. FKM texture must remain sharp.

briefs.cover_frame_direction: Use Shot 1 (IMG-01) frame. Crop 9:16, text-safe top 20% for hook. Ensure 40.35mm socket and retaining lip are visible.
briefs.subtitle_style: Helvetica Neue Bold, 24pt, #F0EDE8, centre-aligned, drop shadow (1px, #0D0D0D, 70% opacity). No background box.
briefs.handoff_for_manual_reel: Shoot VID-05 only. Edit sequence per edit_plan. Export 1080×1920, 24fps, H.264. Add subtitles. Deliver to Asset Director by 2026-05-18 18:00 UTC.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

_meta.primary_angle_title: 40.35mm exact. 0.7mm lip. FKM rubber. No drilling.
